document_id: AV-21 Pipeline Companies Annual Report for Ad Valorem Tax Valuation

findings.description: Rowspan merged cells in the first column of the table were split into individual cells.
findings.evidence: In the 'Summary of Stock and Debt' table (Schedule A), category labels like 'Stock' and 'Long Term Debt' span multiple empty rows in the PDF. In the HTML conversion, these merged cells are split, and the label text is repeated for every individual row.
